candidate_definition_hints.text: A very simple whsper Python FastAPI for OpenAI API, Android voice-typing (konele), Home Assistant (wyoming), and a voice-typing script on Linux and MacOS!

Whisper-FastAPI is a very simple Python FastAPI interface for konele and OpenAI services. It is based on the `faster-whisper` project and provides an API for konele-like interface, where translations and transcriptions can be obtained by connecting over websockets or POST reques…
